sentences.arabic: يَلْعَبُ جَابِرٌ كُرَةَ الْقَدَمِ مَعَ أَصْدِقَائِهِ كُلَّ جُمْعَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Jabir igra fudbal s prijateljima svaki petak.
sentences.translationEn: Jabir plays football with his friends every Friday.

sentences.translation: Osjeća sreću i živost nakon igre.
sentences.translationEn: He feels happy and active after playing.

sentences.arabic: يَقُولُ إِنَّ الرِّيَاضَةَ مَعَ الْأَصْدِقَاءِ أَمْتَعُ مِنَ الرِّيَاضَةِ مُنْفَرِدًا.
sentences.translation: Kaže da je sport s prijateljima zabavniji od sporta samog.
sentences.translationEn: He says that sport with friends is more fun than sport alone.

sentences.translation: Nakon utakmice jedu zajedno i razgovaraju.
sentences.translationEn: After the match they eat together and talk.
